ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the stock data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price accounting for dividends and splits */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month in which the data was recorded */,
  "est_N2" REAL /* Estimated nitrogen dioxide emissions related to stock activity */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL for Apple) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the stock details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time at which trading opens */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time at which trading closes */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES stock_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_close" REAL /* Predicted closing price for the stock */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0 to 1) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for prediction */,
  "prediction_source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the metrics are calculated */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_metrics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with this historical record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "data_validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental impact entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the environmental impact */,
  "est_N2" REAL /* Estimated nitrogen dioxide emissions associated with stock trading */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental impact */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date when the environmental impact was estimated */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the estimation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the impact was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_impact_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., earnings call, product launch) */,
  "impact" REAL /* Estimated impact of the event on stock price */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the event information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_events_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
